rationale: The translation is technically accurate and maintains the direct, instructional style of the original. It correctly handles the MDX requirements, including the relative paths for assets (../). It uses standard Arabic technical terminology (e.g., 'دالة مساعدة' for utility method, 'دالة الاستدعاء' for callback). The other candidate used non-breaking spaces (U+202F) in headings which can sometimes cause rendering issues in certain environments, whereas this candidate used standard spacing.
